docket_entries.description: HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE ADDITIONAL FEES AND COSTS FILED BY PETITIONER REID, ERIC HEARING SET FOR APR-23-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER ERIC REID'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS.FEE WAIVER DENIED. ERIC REID HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A.J. ROBERTSON; CLERK: DLOK/EBURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)
